Annotation

Conclusion and Recommendations based on this report and previous findings known to us
The patient shows mildly elevated HbA1c, indicating impaired glucose metabolism or prediabetes, and a slightly high chloride level, which may be clinically insignificant if asymptomatic. Renal function, electrolytes, and lipid profile are within normal limits. Recommend follow-up for glycemic control and clinical correlation for chloride elevation.
